name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: ACE Cash Express provides installment loans, title loans, check cashing, money transfers, and bill payment at physical stores and online across the US.
description_long:
ACE Cash Express is one of the largest alternative financial services companies in the United States, operating a network of retail financial service centers alongside an online lending platform. The company serves consumers who need access to financial products outside of traditional banking channels, offering both walk-in store services and internet-based loan applications. Customer support is available through two dedicated phone lines — (877) ACE-CASH for general inquiries and (866) ACE-CASH for online loan customers — as well as email at customerservice@acecashexpress.com and InternetOps@acecashexpress.com.

ACE Cash Express offers a broad menu of services under one roof. Loan products include installment loans and title loans aimed at consumers who need short-term access to cash. Beyond lending, ACE provides check cashing, bill payments, money transfers, and tax preparation services. The company's Porte prepaid debit card extends its offering to the unbanked and underbanked, and business services are available at select locations for small business owners.

What distinguishes ACE from single-service lenders is its multi-product footprint. A customer can cash a paycheck, pay a utility bill, send a money transfer, and apply for an installment loan in a single store visit. The company also maintains a separate online lending channel, giving borrowers the option to apply without visiting a branch. A store locator tool helps customers find nearby physical locations.

ACE Cash Express fills a real need for consumers locked out of traditional banking, but borrowers should approach with eyes open. Title loans in particular carry the risk of vehicle repossession if the loan cannot be repaid. The reviewed pages returned 404 errors and did not disclose specific APRs or loan terms — consumers should request the full cost of credit in writing before signing. Those with access to credit unions or CDFIs offering payday alternative loans (PALs) at sub-36% APR should compare those options first.
address: 15948 S Post Oak Rd Ste J, Houston, TX 77053

company_info.headquarters: 15948 S Post Oak Rd Ste J, Houston, TX 77053

pros: Multi-service locations — loans, check cashing, bill pay, money transfers, and tax prep available in one branch visit
Both in-store and online lending channels for borrower flexibility
Porte prepaid debit card provides a banking-like option for unbanked consumers
Business services available at select locations for small business owners
Two dedicated customer service channels — separate lines for general inquiries and online loan customers
Tax preparation services bundled with financial services under one roof
Store locator tool to find nearby physical branches
cons: Specific APRs and loan terms were not disclosed on the reviewed pages — full cost of credit unclear without contacting ACE directly
Title loans carry vehicle repossession risk if the borrower defaults
Short-term loan products are high-cost by design and are not suitable for ongoing or long-term financial needs
Store availability is regional — not all services offered in every state
Installment and title loan costs are typically far higher than bank or credit union alternatives
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers needing check cashing or a prepaid card without a bank account
Borrowers who need fast access to a small loan amount and live near a physical ACE location
Consumers who need to pay bills or send money transfers without a traditional bank
Small business owners needing business financial services outside standard bank hours
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best for unbanked or underbanked consumers who need fast short-term funds, everyday check cashing, or financial services without a traditional bank account. The main caveat is that their title and installment loan products carry substantially higher costs and risks — including repossession on title loans — than credit union or CDFI alternatives, and specific rate disclosures were unavailable from the reviewed pages.

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Populus Financial Group, Inc. (F/K/A Ace Cash Express)
